overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage depicting a player exploring an industrial outskirts district at dusk, pausing to observe a massive holographic advertisement tower, then driving along a multi-lane highway toward a large illuminated stadium structure. The environment features a mix of traditional wooden architecture and industrial concrete structures under a twilight sky with artificial neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial outskirts street with mixed residential buildings

events.description: turning left to follow the street curvature around the wooden building
massive holographic advertisement tower becomes visible on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street, turning left to explore the industrial area, passing by a traditional wooden house

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the street in front of the camera
figure standing near the entrance of the wooden house

entered.detail: traditional-style wooden building with warm illuminated windows and sloped roof
tall concrete industrial structure with metal pipes and platforms
modern tall street light with bright white LED illumination
base structure of massive cylindrical advertisement tower with green metal framework

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a dimly lit industrial street at dusk, passing a traditional wooden house with glowing windows. The camera turns left, revealing industrial silos and the base of a massive holographic tower in the distance. Sparse pedestrians are visible, including one crossing the street ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza beneath massive holographic advertisement tower

events.description: camera pans left and tilts upward to focus on the holographic tower structure
camera tilts to vertical position looking straight up at the tower against the sky

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the massive holographic advertisement tower, tilting head back to view the full height of the structure

entered.detail: massive circular holographic screen displaying colorful rotating advertisements around the tower
upper geometric structure of the tower with illuminated panels

segments.scene_description: The player stops to observe a massive cylindrical holographic tower, tilting the camera upward to reveal the full scale of the rotating advertisement ring against the twilight sky. The surrounding buildings fall out of view as the camera focuses on the tower's illuminated spire and the moon visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway leading to stadium complex

events.description: transition from walking to driving vehicle, accelerating onto the highway
approaching the massive illuminated stadium structure with spotlights visible on the roof
driving beneath large concrete overpass that temporarily blocks the sky view

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the multi-lane highway, navigating through moderate traffic toward the stadium complex

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane with brake lights illuminated
vehicle overtaking on the right side of the highway

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure with multiple arches spanning across the highway
massive curved stadium wall with bright spotlights on top and industrial scaffolding
tall electrical transmission towers with multiple high-tension cables
illuminated traffic signs and commercial billboards along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to a vehicle driving along a wide highway toward a massive illuminated stadium structure in the distance. The road passes under large concrete overpasses and alongside power lines, with other vehicles visible ahead and overtaking. The stadium grows larger as the vehicle approaches, dominating the horizon beneath the twilight sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a quiet industrial street at dusk into a high-speed journey toward a glowing urban landmark. It begins with a walk past a traditional wooden house with glowing windows, moving left to reveal industrial silos and the distant base of a massive holographic tower. As the camera halts, it tilts upward to capture the full scale of the rotating advertisement ring and its illuminated spire against the twilight sky and moon. The perspective then shifts seamlessly to a vehicle accelerating along a wide highway, passing under concrete overpasses and power lines while overtaking other cars. Finally, the scene expands as the vehicle drives forward, with a massive illuminated stadium growing larger until it dominates the horizon.
